Converted from canonical ground truth (curator timed out on large repo)

text: Nested block inheritance regression at 3+ levels. BlockNode.render() and ExtendsNode.render() in loader_tags.py handle block context resolution. Template._render() in base.py manages the rendering pipeline. The bug is in how block_context is managed during multi-level extends resolution.
